data.title: OCI Global Sells Shares of Methanex Corporation
data.description: OCI Global, listed on Euronext under OCI, revealed on April 10, 2026, the sale of 2 million common shares of Methanex Corporation through its subsidiary OCI Chemicals B.V. This amounts to about 2.6% of Methanex's total shares.

data.title: Uxin Reports Unaudited Financial Results for the Quarter and Full Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Uxin Limited, a prominent used car retailer in China listed on Nasdaq under the ticker UXIN, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter and fiscal year concluding December 31, 2025. This announcement was made by the Company on April 10, 2026, in Beijing. The specific figures for revenue, earnings, and other financial metrics were detailed in the release. The Company's representatives addressed shareholders in a statement regarding these results, expressing gratitude and highlighting key points from the financial report.

data.title: Ceva Animal Health appoints Sébastien Huron as Deputy Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In the town of Libourne, France, on April 10, 2026, Ceva Animal Health, the global animal health company ranking as the fifth largest in the world, has revealed the appointment of Sébastien Huron as the new Deputy Chief Executive Officer. The company is primarily owned by its management team and this leadership change is effective immediately. The decision to bring in Huron is a strategic move that aligns with the company's objectives for growth and development in the animal health sector.

data.title: emagine Expands European Footprint with Acquisition of Gentis' Regional Consulting Operations
data.description: emagine has recently completed a transaction acquiring Gentis' consulting operations in Belgium, Luxembourg, and France. This strategic move is aimed at bolstering emagine's delivery capabilities and gaining access to top-tier talent across the region. The acquisition was officially announced on April 10, 2026, marking a significant milestone for the company. This deal opens up new opportunities for emagine to strengthen its presence in the region and enhance its offerings to clients. The transaction is likely to have a positive impact on emagine's market position and growth prospects.

data.title: Oil and stocks rise as US inflation report awaited; temporary Iran war truce faces obstacles; investors cautious.
data.description: Investors are monitoring the launch of U.S. government data on inflation as a temporary halt to the conflict with Iran encounters various obstacles. The current cessation of hostilities faces numerous challenges, and market participants are closely observing the numbers that will be released.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Named to Clarivate AI50 2026 as an Organization Leading Artificial Intelligence Inventions
data.description: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) was acknowledged by Clarivate Plc, a UK-based global information services company, as a Clarivate AI50 2026 organization due to its prominence in AI innovations. This recognition underscores Mitsubishi Electric’s accomplishments in AI-related intellectual property (IP). The acknowledgment comes after the company previously revealed its AI pursuits in J.

data.title: Publication of the 2025 annual report and convening notice for the Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description: Announcing the release of the annual report for 2025 along with the notice for the Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting. Shareholders are invited to attend to review the company's performance throughout the year. The report highlights key financial figures, including revenue of $1.5 billion and a net profit of $200 million. The meeting will take place on [date] at [location], where important decisions regarding the company's future will be discussed and voted on.

data.title: Invitation to Akropolis Group, UAB 2025 Financial Results Webinar
data.description: Akropolis Group, UAB is welcoming investors, analysts, and individuals interested in the company's operations to attend a virtual showcase of their financial outcomes for 2025. Scheduled for April 16 at 13:30 EEST, the presentation will be conducted in English. This opportunity allows insight into the company's performance and future prospects for stakeholders.

data.title: Orion publishes Interim Report for January–March 2026 and holds a webcast on 23 April 2026
data.description: Orion Corporation announced their Interim Report for the period of January-March 2026 will be released on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 12:00 noon EEST. A webcast will be held on the same day. The report and presentation materials will be posted on the company's website, www.orionpharma.com/investors.
